data.title: US-Listed Chinese Stocks Fall As China's Central Bank Keeps Key Rates Steady
data.description: PBOC keeps benchmark LPR rates steady amid economic growth efforts and a weakening yuan. US-listed Chinese stocks trading lower.

data.title: From Self-Drive To Chauffeur Delight: Zoomcar Cabs Tests The Waters In Bengaluru
data.description: Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZCAR) shares down on new pilot program in Bengaluru for Zoomcar Cabs, offering commercial cars with drivers at competitive prices to cater to customer demand for reliable, transparent alternatives to traditional cab services. Expansion planned for 2025.

data.title: FDA Approves Ionis Pharmaceuticals' Rare Genetic Disease Therapy to Lower High-Level Of Fat In Blood
data.description: Ionis' Tryngolza receives FDA approval for familial chylomicronemia syndrome, showing significant triglyceride reduction and fewer pancreatitis events.
